description_long: This is a large, open rectangular cabinet or booth-like structure with three solid walls and no visible doors, shelves, or compartments. The exterior walls are a deep reddish-brown color, while the interior back wall features a lighter, wood-textured panel. The structure is tall enough for adults to stand inside comfortably, as shown by the two human figures within. The open front allows easy access to the interior, making it suitable for use as a booth, display case, or partitioned area in an urban environment. The surfaces appear to be made of wood or wood-like material, with a matte finish and no visible hardware or glass. The overall design is simple, functional, and robust, with ample interior space for standing or placing objects.
description: A large, open, three-walled cabinet or booth with reddish-brown exterior and a wood-textured back wall, tall enough for adults to stand inside. The structure is simple, sturdy, and accessible from the open front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open side, interior space, and two standing human figures against the wood-textured back wall.
description_view_1: Side view with one wall blocking most of the interior, only the head and shoulders of one figure are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid reddish-brown back wall, with no interior or figures visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other wall blocking most of the interior, only one figure partially visible.
